testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
22:09:43.664 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplicationTests]: WechatApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:09:43.736 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplication for test class main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplicationTests 22:09:43.787 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplicationTests]: WechatApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 22:09:43.789 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplication for test class main.com.chat.wechat.WechatApplicationTests

testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/thanh/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.17.8/byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
